hero.title: Engineered Intelligence.
hero.subtitle: We build custom software, scale existing platforms, and integrate AI into your operations. Backed by 7+ years of expertise, we don't just write code—we understand your business first to deliver solutions that reduce errors and accelerate growth.

services.subtitle: Whether you need a product built from scratch or legacy code modernized, we provide the technical firepower.

software.title: End-to-End Development

legacy.title: Legacy & Existing Systems
legacy.desc: Have a project that needs saving or scaling? We are stack-agnostic problem solvers who step in to optimize, maintain, and evolve your existing codebase.

ai.title: Applied Artificial Intelligence
ai.desc: We help small and medium businesses adopt AI safely. Automate workflows, reduce human error, and gain speed without losing the human touch.

seo.title: Controlla Technologies {'|'} Custom Software Engineering & AI Solutions
seo.description: Controlla Technologies is a nearshore software engineering agency. We build custom software, scale existing platforms, and integrate applied AI to transform your enterprise operations.
seo.keywords: Controlla Technologies, software engineering agency mexico, custom software development, nearshore software mexico, ai integration services, applied artificial intelligence
seo.faq1_a: We provide end-to-end custom software development, legacy system modernization, and applied artificial intelligence solutions.
seo.faq2_a: We are strategically positioned in Mexico, allowing us to offer nearshore engineering talent with seamless real-time collaboration in US time zones.
seo.faq3_q: How does Controlla approach AI integration?
seo.faq3_a: We focus on safe, practical AI adoption for small and medium businesses, automating workflows and reducing errors without losing the human touch.

mastery.title: 7+ Years of Mastery
mastery.desc: Nearly a decade of technical rigor across diverse stacks and industries. We bring battle-tested experience to ensure robust and scalable enterprise solutions.

location.title: Chihuahua Advantage
location.desc: Strategically positioned in Chihuahua, Mexico. We offer seamless real-time collaboration in US time zones, deep cultural affinity, and world-class engineering talent at highly competitive rates.

approach.title: Empathy Before Code.
approach.p1: In an era of automated everything, we believe the best technical solutions start with human understanding. We sit down with your team, analyze your day-to-day operations, and identify the true friction points.
approach.p2: Only then do we deploy our engineered intelligence—fast, precise, and built around the people who will actually use it.

caseStudies.title: Proven Impact
caseStudies.subtitle: Discover how we've applied engineered intelligence to transform operations and scale digital platforms.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your operations?
cta.subtitle: Whether you need a team to build your next big idea or an AI strategy to streamline your business, we are ready to partner with you.

footer.description: Controlla Technologies builds custom software and AI solutions that scale businesses globally from our HQ in Chihuahua, Mexico.
